description: Converts a Comma separated values (CSV) file to a Flow Cytometry Standard (FCS) file.
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## CsvToFcs GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
CsvToFcs is a GenePattern module that Converts a Comma separated values (CSV) file to a Flow Cytometry Standard (FCS) file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: Input.CSV.data.file, Range
- Optional: Output.FCS.file.name, Data.type

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>csv2fcs.jar <Input.CSV.data.file> <Output.FCS.file.name> <Range> <Data.type>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Input.CSV.data.file
parameters.description: A CSV file to be converted to FCS.

parameters.name: Output.FCS.file.name
parameters.description: The name of the output FCS file.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: Value of the $PnR keyword for all parameters. By default, this tool will try to set the best settings based on the data in the file; use "auto", "auto-exact", "BD", or an integer value.

parameters.name: Data.type
parameters.description: Value of the $DATATYPE keyword. By default, this tool will try to set the best settings based on the data in the input CSV file.
